subject: Context: Series A $12M closed February 2026
body:
Alex,

BrightPath AI has increased open engineering roles by 85% in the last 60 days.

Companies scaling after Series A often find it difficult to onboard senior Python engineers fast enough.

Tenacious provides pre-vetted senior Python engineers ready to contribute from day one.

How are you planning to accelerate your backend scaling?

Birkity
Research Partner, Tenacious Intelligence Corporation
gettenacious.com
